sourcesContent: import React from 'react' import Video from '../../profilePic'; import ProfileImage from '../../profilePic/profileImage.jpeg'; import {IntroContainer, IntroVideo, Intro, VideoBg, Content, Name, ProfilePic} from './intro' const intro = () => { return ( Fayed Raza Incoming Software Engineer Intern at Vanguard Learning Assistant for Rutgers CS112 Data Structures Hi, my name is Fayed. I am currently a sophomore at Rutgers University majoring in Bachelor of Science, Computer Science and minoring in Mathematics. Asides from school, being a learning assistant, and interning, I like to build apps. Whether if it is a bot, website, etc., I have the interest to learn and build it, especially when I get to work with others. ); }; export default intro
